75502.subject: Well Informed: How little exercise can you get away with?
75502.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA5d2CFEHGYfpS--K_uNhCfG3kHq03oyQRGFNYrRO5bnA6551PcAlDb9TQZpGMchPYEeW2sJEHwKZ6AK9K8Y-Asf4Bo07X0BXxdeCKblZISgy 

July 5th 2026

 

 
 
 
Well Informed

 Your evidence-based guide to health and wellness


 
 
 






 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA5d2CFEI5gHGjy8Lp5tPeUu0YQd5IXlJyw2OI3B44fHQpCaFh_B0qCvf4LxwqSzfla8EGVsNFheWKU8KmMqqdudrwT2qOVqNQjSyap5fCVeV 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA5d2CFEJJMPzcJ5Q3CeMqX52ir5WaF_Tj032y6bYzrbVkjUoDtUJAyYzCpeXB_3zx7kSBf4KUeV2zoAyATkb_wLJ-t2b3s08RhbGSSvCY8yz 



 How little exercise can you get away with?


 Tim Cross

Senior science writer


 I am reliably informed that there are people out there who enjoy cardio. My officemate claims to like nothing more than spending hours running up and down fells in various windswept bits of the country, and can talk enthusiastically about ideas like “the pain cave”. Although I try to drag myself out for a couple of short runs every week, for me it’s a bit like brushing your teeth: something you do because it’s good for you.


 My favourite sport is bouldering, which involves brief bursts of hard work followed by several minutes spent sitting on the mats chatting to your mates. So imagine my delight when 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAA

75498.subject: PlaidвАЩs AI now sees what no single bank can рЯСАрЯП¶; Santander just open-sourced its AI governance stack. No other major bank has рЯ§ЦрЯП¶
75498.body:
Weekly FinTech Digest

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Linas Beli≈Ђnas


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Linas Beli≈Ђnas

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/plaids-ai-now-sees-what-single-bank-can-santander-just-linas-beli%C5%ABnas-9p9df?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BwlEUn8z2SsGuYayF%2BPJm7g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0-SXlD9GC3wck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr7kgroz~mv-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr7kgroz-mv
  
рЯСЛ Hey, Linas here! Welcome to a рЯФУ weekly free edition рЯФУ of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, itвАЩs the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech. If youвАЩre not a subscriber, hereвАЩs what you missed last week: GLM-5.2: The ChatGPT Moment for Local AI рЯ§Ц [Why the first open-weight model that rivals Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 вАФ and runs on a single Mac вАФ changes the game for every founder, builder, and investor] Turn Claude Into an AI Research Powerhouse With StanfordвАЩs STORM Method рЯІ† [StanfordвАЩs proven AI research framework, adapted for Claude вАФ with copy-paste prompts and a ready-made Skill] Unlock Claude Fable 5 Lite on Claude Opus 4.8 рЯФУ [The full Fable 5 system prompt and the step-by-step guide to turn Claude Opus 4.8 into a Fable-class AI assistant after Anthropic shut it down] Loop Engineering: How to Design AI Loops That Build, Ship, and Improve While You Sleep рЯФБ [From a three-line bash script to multi-day Claude Fable 5 autonomy вАФ everything founders, builders, and investors need to stop prompting agents and start designing the systems that prompt them] How to Pre-Mortem Any Decision With AI: The Future Failure Audit Skill for Claude рЯФЃ [The highest-leverage Claude skill most founders are missing. It assumes your plan has already failed, finds the hidden assumption that kills it, and rewrites it before you commit a single dollar] Interactive Brokers just let Grok, Claude, and ChatGPT into your portfolio - on purpose рЯ§ЦрЯУК [what IBKRвАЩs new AI capabilities are all about, how it compares to what Robinhood & eToro have launched, and why it might be the most defensible play + bonus deep dive into Coinbase pivot to Financial OS for AI Agents, how Anthropic wants to be Wall StreetвАЩs OS, and AI Playbook for Finance inside] SoFi acquired Composer and bet against the Agentic AI trading rush рЯ§ЦрЯТЄ [what Composer by SoFi is all about, why itвАЩs interesting, how it stacks against AI initiatives from Coinbase & Robinhood, and whatвАЩs next + bonus deep dive into Interactive BrokersвАЩ new AI features & how to build an AI Agent from scratch inside] Wall Street banks are now AmericaвАЩs AI border guards рЯ§ЦрЯЗЇрЯЗЄ [why JPMorgan & Goldman Sachs pulled Claude models from its

75495.subject: We're adding new delight to your night! Night transport services were renewed on 1 July
75495.body:
![BudapestGO] (https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=25&F=T)

Dear Oleg Novosadov,
As of 1 July, nighttime public transport in Budapest and the greater
Budapest area has been reorganised. As a result of public and professional
consultations, weвАЩve created a network tailored to your needs that makes
nighttime travel more convenient for everyone. Discover the new night
transport network and plan your route with BudapestGO!
![Night public transport has been renewed]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=144&F=T)
As the city changes, so do travel needs and habits. The last comprehensive
overhaul of the nighttime transport system took place more than twenty
years ago, so todayвАЩs network only partially reflects changing travel
habits and the evolution of the daytime transport system. Based on
professional and public consultations, we have redesigned the night
network; the new system went into effect on the night of 1 to 2 July.

Learn about the new network and the timetable: [bkk.hu/nighttransport]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=145&F=T)

The new network:
•

more closely resembles the daytime network, so you can travel at night in
the same way youвАЩre used to during the day;
•

takes you closer to your home, so youвАЩll have to walk less to the night
bus stopsвАФincluding those in the Havanna, K√°poszt√°smegyer and
B√©k√°smegyer housing estatesвАФand also connects new areas to the night
transport network, such as K√Їtv√ґlgy and the Helikopter residential park;
•

provides more frequent and faster access at night to numerous locations
throughout the city and its metropolitan area;
•

provides new, direct connections from city centre to, among other places,
Soroks√°r, the western side of R√°kosszentmih√°ly, the
Nagyt√©t√©ny-kertv√°ros, the Budafok-Budat√©t√©ny and R√°kospalota;
•

reduces unnecessary noise pollution through the use of environmentally
friendly nighttime trolleybuses and on-demand buses that operate only when
there is travel need;
•

as youвАЩve come to expect, the M2, M3, and M4 metro lines continue to
operate with extended hours, and the parallel night lines do not run along
the entire routes at weekends until 1:00 in the morning, but connect to the
metro network at the metro terminuses or at the outer metro stations.

Plan your trip conveniently with BudapestGO.

Thank you for choosing public transport even at night!

Best regards,

BKK Centre for Budapest Transport
This newsletter is sent to your email address registered in BudapestGO on
the basis of the legitimate interest of BKK as data controller. If you no
longer wish to receive messages related to the service, you can unsubscribe
by clicking [here]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=72&F=T) . You can
check and change your notification settings [here]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=71&F=T) .

For inform
